name.description: The name of the workflow definition

version.description: The version of the workflow definition

tasks.description: The list of tasks in the workflow

inputParameters.description: List of input parameter names for the workflow

failureWorkflow.description: Name of the workflow to execute when this workflow fails

workflowStatusListenerEnabled.description: Whether to enable workflow status listener

ownerEmail.description: Email of the workflow definition owner

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the workflow
